creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Larry Rosenman from comment #10)
The SYN packets in the capture appear to be correct (and are getting sent), so that points in the direction of the problem being elsewhere.

What's the host you're trying to SSH to? It might be worth testing a different machine to see if it happens with that one too.

(If required I can send you an address of one of my machines to ssh to, so we can compare.)
